settings.html:
Join the Velocity Community

Velocity is one moment in a year-round community. The two memberships below are the primary ways real estate professionals participate — the new Five Star Alliance for the broader RE professional community, and FORCE for the credentialed agent and broker corps.

Five Star Alliance Photo

Real estate professionals at work or in community. 480x220px JPG.

Five Star Alliance Membership

Launching at Velocity 2026. The professional community for agents, brokers, and investors building businesses in REO, distressed property, and single-family residential investment. Includes Velocity participation, year-round community access, FSI Offers platform tier benefits, and the FSI RE community directory. Charter Member pricing locked at $300/yr for the first 100 new members; standard rate $495/yr after.

Learn about Five Star Alliance →

FORCE Membership

The credentialed core of the FSI real estate community for fifteen years. FORCE certification is the recognized credential for agents and brokers working with institutional REO inventory and distressed property. Velocity is FORCE's home event, including FORCE Connect — structured introductions with the asset managers and disposition professionals who attend as guests of the association.

Learn about FORCE →
